    San Francisco, CA Homes for Sale

    Experience elevated city living at 1461 Broadway in coveted Nob Hill. This remodeled 1-bedroom condo pairs a refreshed, modern kitchen and a spa-like updated bathroom with the warmth of a gas fireplace, plus a large walk-in closet for exceptional storage. Step onto your private bedroom balcony and enjoy a peek-a-boo Mt. Tam views a perfect spot for morning coffee or an evening unwind. Laundry facilities on the same floor as a unit add everyday convenience. This unit comes with a deeded parking spot and deeded storage to simplify your life.     San Francisco, CA Homes for Sale

    A rare full-floor garden-level retreat in the heart of Telegraph Hill, this brand new construction studio blends modern luxury with timeless San Francisco charm. Beautifully designed with rich hardwood floors, sleek stainless steel appliances, quartz countertops, designer tile, in-unit laundry, keyless entry, and generous closet space. The open, airy layout creates an effortless flow between living, sleeping, and dining areas, anchored by a stylish full bath. Extensive building upgrades include a new foundation with voluntary seismic reinforcement, all-new electrical and plumbing, a new sewer lateral, double-pane windows, and 400-amp electrical service for lasting peace of mind.     Nature versus City. .. why choose? At the top of the world, yet rooted in the heart of the city, this pristine home is flooded with natural light, embraced by its serene, wooded location.
